entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The target crop of the study, also known as groundnut

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME
entities.description: The complete set of all RNA molecules in a cell

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in an organism

entities.name: GENE FUNCTION
entities.description: The biochemical or physiological role of a gene

entities.name: PHENOME
entities.description: The set of all phenotypic traits of an organism

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC APPROACH
entities.description: The use of transcriptome data to analyze biological processes

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the genomic location of specific traits

entities.name: BI-PARENTAL POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations derived from the crossing of two distinct parents

entities.name: WHOLE TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing the entire transcriptome of a sample

entities.name: IMMATURE SEEDS
entities.description: The specific developmental stage of peanut seeds used for sequencing

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATION
entities.description: A population of homozygous lines derived from crossing two parents

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: Differences in gene expression levels across samples or populations

entities.name: GENETIC BASIS
entities.description: The underlying genetic causes of a trait or variation

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: The basic physical and functional units of heredity

entities.name: PARAMUTATION-LIKE EXPRESSION PATTERN
entities.description: A specific pattern of gene expression resembling paramutation

entities.name: EQTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Expression quantitative trait locus analysis used to map genes regulating expression

entities.name: LOCAL EQTLS
entities.description: eQTLs located in close proximity to the gene they regulate

entities.name: DISTANT EQTLS
entities.description: eQTLs located far from the gene they regulate

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME TRANSCRIPTOMIC VARIATION
entities.description: Variation in gene expression across the entire genome

entities.name: EQTL HOT SPOT REGIONS
entities.description: Genomic regions containing a high density of eQTLs

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC PROFILE
entities.description: The expression pattern of genes in a specific sample

entities.name: ANNOTATION ANALYSES
entities.description: The process of assigning biological meaning to genomic sequences

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENE
entities.description: A gene suspected of being responsible for a specific trait

entities.name: INDEL02
entities.description: A specific linked marker developed for a major QTL

entities.name: MAJOR QTL
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus with a significant effect on a trait

entities.name: PURPLE TESTA COLOUR
entities.description: The color of the seed coat in peanut

entities.name: NON-MODEL PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that are not standard laboratory model organisms
